---
title: Writing useful alt text
summary: Write concise image descriptions that preserve meaning for screen-reader users.
learnerProfile: Writers who publish image-supported learning material and know basic HTML semantics.
prerequisites:
  - Identify the main point of a short paragraph
outcomes:
  - id: identify-image-purpose
    statement: Identify the purpose an image serves in its context
  - id: write-concise-alt-text
    statement: Write concise alternative text without redundant phrasing
createdAt: 2026-07-22
capabilityPacks: []
freshness:
  mode: stable
  verifiedAt: 2026-07-22
---

Good alternative text communicates what a learner needs from an image, not every visible detail.
